title: [Episode Title]

paragraphs.label: HOOK
paragraphs.text: [Begin with a vivid scenario, provocative question, or relatable moment that connects the listener emotionally to the topic.]

paragraphs.label: BRIDGE
paragraphs.text: [Name what this episode is and is not. Set the listener's expectation clearly.]

paragraphs.label: PREVIEW
paragraphs.text: [Tell the listener what they will learn: the 2-3 big ideas and why each matters for their faith or daily life.]

paragraphs.label: ATTENTION GETTER
paragraphs.text: [Close the introduction with a bold statement, surprising fact, or cliffhanger question that creates irresistible curiosity. Do NOT answer it yet -- let it hang.]

paragraphs.label: REFRAME
paragraphs.text: [Step back and reframe how the listener should think about this topic. Correct a common misconception or set up a fresh lens.]

paragraphs.label: BIBLICAL PRECEDENT
paragraphs.text: [Show that this topic appears throughout Scripture with 2-3 brief examples from the Old and New Testaments.]

paragraphs.label: WHY IT MATTERS
paragraphs.text: [Connect everything back to the listener. End with the central question the rest of the episode will answer.]

paragraphs.label: INTRODUCE THE IDEA
paragraphs.text: [State the key concept clearly. Name it, define it, and explain why it matters before going deeper.]

paragraphs.label: SCRIPTURE QUOTE
paragraphs.text: [Introduce and quote the anchor verse in NIV.]

paragraphs.label: COMMENTARY INSIGHT
paragraphs.text: [Integrate a theologian or commentary note in your own conversational style.]

paragraphs.label: LISTENER ENGAGEMENT PROMPT
paragraphs.text: [Re-engage listeners who may have drifted with a direct rhetorical question. Pause briefly before moving on.]

paragraphs.label: APPLICATION
paragraphs.text: [What does this biblical truth mean for the listener right now? Offer a specific, practical example or action.]

paragraphs.label: SUMMARY
paragraphs.text: [Briefly recap the 2-3 most important ideas from the episode. Each idea in one sentence.]

paragraphs.label: CORE TAKEAWAY
paragraphs.text: [Restate the central message of the episode in 1-2 clear sentences.]

paragraphs.label: LISTENER ENGAGEMENT PROMPT
paragraphs.text: [One final question to send them away reflecting. Make it personal and action-oriented.]

paragraphs.label: PRACTICAL CALL TO ACTION
paragraphs.text: [Give them one specific, simple thing to do this week.]

paragraphs.label: CLOSING SCRIPTURE
paragraphs.text: [Introduce and quote the benediction or closing verse in NIV.]
